ab: kiya caxa’ baays mi mateq ka Kaynu’, mamati’ umungi’ i maras cu qaraqarax.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Kaynu’，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Kaynu’, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: mateq ga, kabawx ki baays mateq cu papateq, papawng cu pinateq quqa ruwas ka papatiqan.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: manaxleq, magnapusal, magnatuu’, pakabaxan nha’ cu qaraqarax.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: asikinaga, kiya qutux hmut niya’ ka aqeh, kabawx cu qaraqarax ga mamati’ ini’ pasayu.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: babaw niya’ ru ini’ nha’ pakikabaxi cu qaraqarax la.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: riax ka qutux, maglu cami kahabaag musa’ i magunawu’.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: maki musa’ latanux Kaynu’ cu makiya i raneq, ga’ umungi’ maras cu cacawm cu qaqutian hiya’.
ch: 路途中，Kaynu’想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Kaynu’ wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: kabawx kinku baays niya’ mateq cu cacawm cu qaqutian, asikinaga ciyukun nha’ kahabaag mha, “ini’ cu aras uwi yu!”
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: maimag mangilis cu manata’ i Kaynu’ mha, “micuwa’ cimu kahabaag ka ini’ pakabaxani kuwing cu cacawm cu qaqutian!”
ch: Kaynu’急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!
en: Kaynu’ burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: kalun nku baays mateq mha, “aqeh gi ini’ su’ aras nanak, anauwi ga sipkabawx su’ cu qaraqarax ga, ini’ su’ pasiyugi kariariax!”
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: kincasan, magagaaboq tayhuk papatiqan i Kaynu’, sipasayu kahabaag ni Kaynu’ ku qaraqarax ka kinabaxan niya’ kinku baays niya’ kahabaag la.
ch: 隔天上學，Kaynu’ 很早就到學校了，Kaynu’ 把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Kaynu’ arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: situbun niya’ kahabaag ku baybaays niya’ mha, “paaras kuwing cubalay cu qaraqarax mu nanak i babaw niya’ la, ru mahuway cimu ka sisiwaal mamu pakabawx kuwing ku qaraqarax mamu cku riax ka ini’ ka isting. mahuway cimu! mahuway cimu cubalabalay!”
ch: Kaynu’向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。謝謝你們！真的非常謝謝你們！
en: Kaynu’ apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
